moments.title: Strong deep, resonant tone
moments.summary: You brought a deeper, rounded tone toward the back of the mouth on 4 of 4 notes here — nice expressive choice.

moments.title: Note on 'Now it looks as though they’re here to stay' is sharp
moments.summary: This C5 sat 466c sharp of target — ease off the pressure a touch.

moments.title: Tricky pitch passage
moments.summary: Only 8% of sung frames were in tune across 8 notes — worth a focused practice pass.

moments.title: Matched the reference style: deep, resonant tone
moments.summary: You and the reference both used a deeper, rounded tone toward the back of the mouth in this phrase.

moments.title: Try more pitch slides
moments.summary: The reference leans on smooth slides between notes on 4 notes here; your take stays a bit straighter in tone.

moments.title: Timing drifts in this passage
moments.summary: Your entrances run an average of 366ms late across 4 notes here — try locking in with the beat.
